block_00: Strong month for NZD, will the momentum last?
block_01: The New Zealand dollar (kiwi) is on a strong momentum against its peer currencies since the beginning of November. The kiwi has gained over 4.2% versus the US dollar in November. Stronger than expected macroeconomic reports, boosted sentiment for the New Zealand dollar.
block_02: Most notably, the New Zealand unemployment rate broke to a new record low of 3.9% versus both expectations and previous rate at 4.4%. Meanwhile, inflation is rising closer to the central banks target at 2%,
block_03: while forecast projections are well within the banks range.
block_04: From a technical standpoint NZDUSD broke a short-lived bearish correction on November 12th continuing with the overall uptrend.
block_05: *Perhatian: Performa sebelumnya bukanlah indikasi tepat untuk performa berikutnya.
